join_instruction: Join order_items to orders on order_id, then enrich with products on product_id.
Use sales as the authoritative daily target table for revenue and COGS.
Join orders to customers on customer_id and geography on zip.
Aggregate web_traffic by date and traffic_source before channel comparison.
Join returns to order_items and products on order_id + product_id to recover size and segment.
Join reviews and shipments on order_id to compute delay-rating relationships.
Use inventory snapshot_date monthly aggregates and enrich with products when needed.
Estimate lost revenue by combining inventory stockout exposure with realized category revenue.
